---
title: "Select your region"
toc: false
---

Please select your region from the list below to launch the relevant view on the dashboard. You can also scroll down to the map below to check which region you are in. The map is interactive, so you can zoom in and out to see the regions more clearly. Please note that simplified geometries are used for the map to improve performance, so some regions may appear slightly different from their actual boundaries.

Tip: bookmark your region's dashboard view for quick access in the future.

:::::{.column-screen-inset}

::::{.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 }

## England

::::::{.larger-bullets3}

- [East Midlands, Dwyrain y Canolbarth (ID: E12000004)](#)
- [East of England, Dwyrain Lloegr (ID: E12000006)](#)
- [London, Llundain (ID: E12000007)](#)
- [North East, Gogledd Ddwyrain (ID: E12000001)](#)
- [North West, Gogledd Orllewin (ID: E12000002)](#)
- [South East, De Ddwyrain (ID: E12000008)](#)
- [South West, De Orllewin (ID: E12000009)](#)
- [West Midlands, Gorllewin y Canolbarth (ID: E12000005)](#)
- [Yorkshire and The Humber, Swydd Efrog a Humber (ID: E12000003)](#)

::::::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 }

## Wales

::::::{.larger-bullets3}

- [Canol De Cymru, South Wales Central (ID: W10000007)](#)
- [Canolbarth a Gorllewin Cymru, Mid and West Wales (ID: W10000006)](#)
- [Dwyrain De Cymru, South Wales East (ID: W10000008)](#)
- [Gogledd Cymru, North Wales (ID: W10000001)](#)
- [Gorllewin De Cymru, South Wales West (ID: W10000009)](#)

::::::
:::

::::

:::::

:::{.column-screen-inset}

![](assets/maps/region_map.html){width="100%" height="800px"}

:::
